name: crataegus oxyacantha
title: best benefits of crataegus oxyacantha
description: Crataegus oxyacantha decreases triglycerides, referring to the reduction of triglyceride levels in the blood, which is a type of fat found in the blood that can increase the risk of heart disease when elevated. This benefit is important as high triglyceride levels have been linked to an increased risk of cardiovascular disease, including conditions such as high blood pressure, heart failure, and stroke.
